title: is this love (2)
body:

        - [road rage + no mad by billy](https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/is-this-love)

- ))}}
    - used to have a phone
now i'm all alone
and that microphone can control drones
used to have a car
now it's just home
used to buy it new
now it's a loan and used
used to take a long time
traveling far
now i just zoom there
for an hour or so
then i just sit here
i got hours to go
late night coffee for the stakeout
send a partner for takeout
break out of monotony
with a new mod for skyrim
same old excuses i give for not producin
right now, i'm just not into it
if it ain't spelled out, i can not do it
but i can't do it
so i pick the farmer not the ladder
getting higher doesn't matter
time to get these crops growing
let the flocks move in
and start mowing
i got work to do right here
please excuse me, i'm not moving
when it's time to turn in
i hop to it
tomorrow's a big day
top 3 all time
y'all wanna debate yesterday and today
we're gonna be here a long time
here all da fault lines
alright then let's do it
we all borrow time
today writes checks on tomorrow's dime
and yesterday collects
like so much dust
that we don't move lest we stir it up
little darling stir it up
we been wearing masks
the air is fucked
it's time to clear it up
we been playin games
you gotta care to love
when we try to win
we don't share enough
tell too much we lose room to bluff
so we clam up and prepare to shove
show weak. don't needa mug. just hope and a seat
wait for the cards then eat em up
tips for dealing when i win
is this love, is this love, is this love that i'm feeling
